results.name: autobot
results.description: The Autobots are one of the primary factions in the Transformers mythos. They usually find themselves defending both their own race and other species against the Decepticons and upholding justice and freedom throughout the galaxy.

results.name: auto buyback
results.description: Derived from the buyback keyword, this ability will automatically return a card to your hand after casting it usually after a  condition is met.

results.name: auto equip
results.description: Equipments that attach themselves to other creatures as they enter the battlefield.

results.name: auton
results.description: Living plastic, animated by a Nestene Consciousness.

results.name: avacyn's collar
results.description: The symbol of her church.

results.name: avatar
results.description:
Creatures that have been granted the avatar creature type.
For the series, see [Avatar (Series)](avatar-series).

results.name: avatar state
results.description: When the Avatar taps into the power and skill of all the Avatars before them and goes all glowy-eyed.

results.name: aven
results.description: Bird-like humanoids found throughout the multiverse.

results.name: avishkar
results.description: An Indian-inspired plane of invention, formerly known as Kaladesh.

results.name: avishkar angel
results.description: Angels from Avishkar, distinguishable by their four arms and eye-covering helmets.

results.name: avishkar faction symbol
results.description: Faction symbols found on Avishkar.

results.name: avishkar gremlin
results.description: Little anteater looking guys, they love causing trouble with technology by eating Aether.

results.name: awaken
results.description: Collection tag used to apply the various tags that comprise the keyword Awaken. Should be 1-1 with kw:awaken.

results.name: axgard
results.description: One of the ten realms of Kaldheim, land of dwarves.

results.name: azra
results.description: Purple-skinned, horned humanoids primarily found on Kylem.

results.name: baal (40k)
results.description: Home planet of the Blood Angels Chapter of Space Marines

results.name: bablovia
results.description: The setting for Unstable, a world of mad scientists and steampunk aesthetics.

results.name: bablovia faction symbol
results.description: Faction symbols found on Bablovia.

results.name: background eyes
results.description: Mysterious eyes watching from the background.

results.name: backlit
results.description: Depicts a subject illuminated by a light source behind it.

results.name: backstab
results.description: Stabbed in the back... literally. 🔪 Et tu, Brute? 🗡

results.name: backwards text
results.description: Text that can be read correctly if viewed in a mirror.

results.name: badgermole
results.description: Large, burrowing creatures said to be the first earthbenders.

results.name: badnik
results.description: Dr. Eggman's robot minions.

results.name: baghdad
results.description: Not to be confused with the Baghdad in [Rabiah](rabiah).
